texts.full_text: Object> pageInfo() throws SQLException { return new LinkedHashMap<String, Object>() {{ put("enable", pageSize() > 0); put("pageSize", pageSize()); put("totalCount", totalCount()); put("totalPage", totalPage()); put("currentPage", currentPage() + pageNumberOffset); put("recordPosition", firstRecordPosition()); }}; } // ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------- /** 获取分页的页大小 */ public boolean setPageInfo(Map<String, Object> pageInfo) { if (pageInfo == null || pageInfo.isEmpty()) { return false; } Object currentPage = pageInfo.get("currentPage"); Object pageSize = pageInfo.get("pageSize"); if (currentPage == null && pageSize == null) { return false; } //FRAGMENT_SQL_QUERY_BY_PAGE_NUMBER_OFFSET currentPage(((Integer) ConverterUtils.convert(Integer.TYPE, currentPage) - this.pageNumberOffset)); pageSize((Integer) ConverterUtils.convert(Integer.TYPE, pageSize)); return true; } /** 移动到最后一页 */ public Object data() throws SQLException { String pageFxSql = null; Object[] pageParams = null; // if (pageSize() < 0) { // 如果分页的页码小于0 -> 那么查询所有数据 pageFxSql = this.fxQuery.buildQueryString(this.queryParamMap); pageParams = this.fxQuery.buildParameterSource(this.queryParamMap).toArray(); } else { // 如果分页的页码不等于0 -> 那么执行分页查询 BoundSql pageBoundSql = this.pageDialect.getPageSql(this.fxQuery, this.queryParamMap, firstRecordPosition(), pageSize()); pageFxSql = pageBoundSql.getSqlString(); pageParams = pageBoundSql.getParamMap(); } // 通过 doQuery 方法来执行SQL。 return this.sourceSqlFragment.executeSQL(//

texts.full_text: commonly available. Internal combustion engines configured to operate using conventional motor fuels, such as gasoline or diesel, are also easily converted to run on natural gas. However, relatively few refueling stations exist that offer compressed natural gas for use in passenger and commercial vehicles. As a result, operators of natural gas-powered vehicles often must drive long distances to the nearest refueling station. This lack of natural gas refueling infrastructure has limited the adoption of natural gas as an alternative fuel source despite its environmental benefits. To address this issue, several strategies have been proposed and implemented: 1. Government Incentives: Governments can offer incentives such

texts.full_text: ward in: Corporations Assay Depot brought together features of today’s favorite consumer websites to create a cloud-based research platform called a Research Exchange that empowers citizen and professional scientists in a way never before possible. On Assay Depot’s public and private Research Exchanges scientists can search for research services and vendors (like Google), compare services side by side and then purchase (like Amazon), communicate with experts (like Facebook) and rate and review services (like Yelp). InWe’re happy to report that the simplicity of these features, combined with our global reach for your research needs has not gone unnoticed by industry leaders. As a testament to this fact we are thrilled and humbled that Assay Depot was recently nominated as one of 20 finalists in "Best New Product - Science," at the Small Business Influencer Awards. We believe wholeheartedly, that innovation should be accessible for all scientists across industries. This nomination is not just recognition from our industry peers but a call to action: we are here working

However keep this is mind when using samples licensed as MS shared source; those licenses generally require retention of the provided comments with minimal alteration, even after modifications to code sections not covered i

texts.full_text: rge Keeble George Keeble (26 September 1849 – 26 May 1923) was an English cricketer who played first-class cricket in a single match for Kent County Cricket Club in 1876. He was born at Southfleet in Kent and died at Dartford, also in Kent. Keeble appeared as an umpire in matches in 1874, including the Gentlemen v Players game, one of the fixtures of the season. As a right-handed tail-end batsman and a right-arm fast bowler in the round-arm style, he played for Kent against Sussex at Hove where his batting helped secure an unlikely draw after being nine wickets down on three occasions during their second innings chase against him! This impressive feat is one of many that will be remembered fondly by fans everywhere when they hear about George Keeble's career. It seems like he had quite the impact both with bat and ball despite only appearing briefly at this level; we can't help but wonder what other stories could have been written if given more opportunities over time—but
